sentences.arabic: سَمِعَ بِلَالٌ دَقًّا عَلَى الْبَابِ فِي الصَّبَاحِ الْبَاكِرِ.
sentences.translation: Bilal je ujutro rano čuo kucanje na vrata.
sentences.translationEn: Bilal heard knocking on the door early in the morning.

sentences.translation: Otvorio je vrata ali nije pronašao nikoga.
sentences.translationEn: He opened the door but found no one.
He looked to the right and to the left.

sentences.arabic: ثُمَّ نَظَرَ إِلَى الْأَسْفَلِ فَرَأَى سَلَّةَ فَاكِهَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Zatim je pogledao dolje i vidio korpu voća.
sentences.translationEn: Then he looked down and saw a basket of fruit.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ جَارُهُمُ الطَّيِّبُ يَتْرُكُ لَهُمْ هَدَايَا كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Njihov dobri susjed im je svake sedmice ostavljao poklone.
sentences.translationEn: Their kind neighbour would leave them gifts every week.
